next_step: define a bounded residual support-width promotion gate with exact criteria for any default support-width change
rationale: The seed-2 support-width repeat has matching local and Colab artifact-backed evidence. In both backends, top-k 2 support improves ordinary alpha-0 supervised CE loss and final residual loss over the top-k 1 baseline at larger-char and tokenized scales. This satisfies the repeat gate, but it does not itself change the default support width.
